title: Chopper Diagnostic v1
description: Wire-format schema for a single Diagnostic record as serialized by `src/chopper/core/serialization.py`. Contract surface between the Chopper engine and any downstream consumer (CI dashboards, GUI, external tooling). Every field that appears in `diagnostics.json` or on the stderr JSONL stream (future FD-10) MUST validate against this schema. All severities, exit codes, slugs, and recovery hints are authoritative in `technical_docs/DIAGNOSTIC_CODES.md`; this schema pins only the on-wire shape.

code.description: Diagnostic identifier. Must match an Active row in technical_docs/DIAGNOSTIC_CODES.md. Family: V=validator, T=tracer, P=parser. Severity letter: E=error, W=warning, I=info.

slug.description: Stable kebab-case identifier, e.g. 'file-not-in-domain'. Stable across releases; safe for log grep and automation.

severity.description: Nominal severity. `--strict` does NOT rewrite this field; it only changes the process exit code. See bible §5.9 and DIAGNOSTIC_CODES.md for the exit-code policy.

phase.description: Pipeline phase that produced the diagnostic. Matches chopper.core.diagnostics.Phase enum values.

source.description: Engine component that emitted the diagnostic. Useful for filtering in the GUI.

message.description: Single-line human-readable message. No embedded newlines; consumers render on one line unless they explicitly wrap. Not localized in v1.

path.description: Domain-relative POSIX path if the diagnostic is tied to a specific file. `null` for run-level diagnostics. Never an absolute path; never a Windows backslash path. Serialized via Path.as_posix().

line_no.description: 1-indexed line number within `path` when applicable. `null` when the diagnostic is not line-specific.

hint.description: Optional one-line recovery hint rendered by the CLI. Free text. Short enough for a TTY line.

context.description: Arbitrary JSON-safe key/value map for machine consumers (e.g., GUI drill-down). Values must be JSON-serializable scalars, arrays, or objects. Does NOT affect dedupe semantics.

dedupe_bucket.description: Optional namespace for multi-context emission. Empty string = default bucket, collapses duplicates globally. Services set distinct bucket values when they want multiple entries for the same (code, path, line_no, message). See ARCHITECTURE_PLAN.md §8.1.

exit_code.description: Nominal exit code contribution for this diagnostic, copied from DIAGNOSTIC_CODES.md. Advisory/informational — the process exit code is computed from the full diagnostic summary per bible §5.9, not by picking the maximum over this field.
